{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603240942391F31594A5F9A262191B7"}"},"total":2},"data_list":[{"comment":{"addition_comment":{"comment_id":"7547284114816369433","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"给自己加个油，希望人气越来越高，平台能多多推广！"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1757240799,"group_id":"7544279296043404312","service_id":13,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2764589338732183"}},"expand":{"book_id":"7544279296043404312","book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"62"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":""},"stat":{"digg_count":0,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":0},"user_action":{"author":1,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"comment_id":"7546832186018153241","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"搞笑中带着责任，接受中带着反抗，成就圣路需要不断突破自我，更要不断打破规则，创造属于自己的升华。主角金手指不断，但还要亲手斩断！[飞吻][飞吻]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1757135567,"group_id":"7544279296043404312","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"自由写作者，喜欢写科幻类，玄幻，爱情","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N1Wy7hsW7be9GbBnDn48nuliOZqI8pBxyL8oC1Zy4T69","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/8fc438cc54d14d349a0af53e1811d4fe~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776880785&x-signature=lPoQKSOzOobSX8UKGmm1w%2FeV%2F8c%3D","user_id":"2764589338732183","user_name":"木子伪博士"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2764589338732183","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":true,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author_level_2","intro":"{"title_name":"作家Lv.2","title_id":"author_level_2"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家Lv.2","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家Lv.2"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7544279296043404312","book_info":{"abstract":"【开局负资产，社畜穿越即破产！】
林霄一睁眼，喜提异界穿越大礼包——附带巨额负债、低劣根骨，以及房东王胖子的无情扫帚。
天胡开局？不，这是地狱难度！走投无路之际，他撞翻了路边老乞丐…等等，这乞丐竟是财神爷？
“叮！【碰瓷系统】激活！新手福利：大喊‘打钱！’即可讨债…副作用？哦，当众放三个响屁而已。”
从此，林霄踏上了一条画风清奇的修仙路：
【搞笑是表象，暗涌是真相】
随着一次次的“舍脸求生”，林霄敏锐察觉到：
他，连同此方世界，不过是【观测者】盘中取乐的棋子！所谓的“系统”，只是更高维度大佬无聊时丢下的“游戏外挂”。
【从碰瓷求生，到弑神证道】
面对终极规则化身【观测者】，常规修行无异于蝼蚁撼树。
亿万众生心念汇聚，化作刺穿虚妄的利剑——“我修的，不是什么系统赐福，也不是狗屁神位！我修的是心之所安，身之所往，无拘无束，笑骂由心的…自在道！”
这是一段从沙雕社畜到自在圣人的传奇史诗。
看林霄如何用最羞耻的姿势（碰瓷+社死），玩转最离谱的金手指（5大神技各有千秋），砸碎冰冷枷锁（掀桌观测者），于红尘烟火中…
证那人人皆可修得的无上圣境——【我自在，即我圣】！","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2oee31d3e0e7b45e4b8e8d73980d85e735~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"木子伪博士","author_id":"","book_id":"7544279296043404312","book_name":"修仙？我靠碰瓷成圣了","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#587888","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"潜力好书","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":257,"name":"玄幻脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=257&name=玄幻脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":7,"name":"玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=7&name=玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7544279524716839448","read_count":"10","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1067880"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"0","serial_count":"365","tags":"玄幻脑洞,玄幻,系统,穿越","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/p2oee31d3e0e7b45e4b8e8d73980d85e735~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779500559&x-signature=0qPdtg4q9IdgWyYL7qcxGs3pnP4%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"2764589338732183","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"62"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603240942391F31594A5F9A262191B7"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":""},"stat":{"digg_count":6,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":39},"user_action":{"author":1,"author_digg_time":1757139239,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"75820
